subcodes.first_line: O youth! Hearken unto that which the Tongue of Grandeur proclaimeth upon the blessed land at the exalted spot. Verily He [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ج و ان استمع ما ینادی به لسان العظمه فی ارض المبارکه علی البقعه البلیه انه
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @power of the Manifestation of God
